insights.text: In their last 5 UEFA Champions League matches, Real Madrid have received an average of 2.6 cards per match, while Bayern Munich have averaged 2.2 cards.
In the last 5 matches of the UEFA Champions League, Real Madrid conceded on average 1.2 goals per match while Bayern Munich conceded on average 0.8 goals per match.
In their last 5 UEFA Champions League  matches, Real Madrid have received an average of 0.4 cards in the first half per match, while Bayern Munich have averaged 0.6 cards.
Chances are good to see a goal from Bayern Munich within the first half. They have averaged 1.6 goals before halftime  in the UEFA Champions League this season.
In their last 3 UEFA Champions League matches, Real Madrid have been awarded an average of 3.6 corners per match, while Bayern Munich have averaged 6.3 corners.
Bayern Munich shine in defence lately. They conceded less than one goal per match on average in the last 5 matches of the UEFA Champions League.
Bayern Munich scored at least one goal per match in the UEFA Champions League this season.
Bayern Munich have been one of the most effective teams in the UEFA Champions League this season, averaging 3.2 goals per match, which is above the league average of 1.6 goals per match.
In the last 3 matches of the UEFA Champions League, Real Madrid scored 7 goals (average 2.3) while Bayern Munich scored 12 (average 4).
Bayern Munich are leading by a goal after 70 minutes of the match.In their last 3 similar situations in the UEFA Champions League, they've won 3 times.

facts.statement: The most common result of matches between Real Madrid and Bayern Munich is 2-1. 4 matches have ended with this result.

During the last 7 meetings with Real Madrid playing at home, Real Madrid have won 5 times, there have been 1 draws while Bayern Munich have won 1 times. The goal difference is 12-8 in favour of Real Madrid.
During the last 18 meetings, Real Madrid have won 9 times, there have been 4 draws while Bayern Munich have won 5 times. The goal difference is 27-21 in favour of Real Madrid.
Real Madrid have a winning streak of 5 matches.
Real Madrid have won 3 home matches in a row.
Bayern Munich haven't lost in their last 12 games.
Bayern Munich have lost none of their last 12 away matches.
Real Madrid have scored at least one goal for 5 consecutive matches.
Bayern Munich have scored at least one goal for 47 consecutive matches.
Real Madrid wins 1st half in 44% of their matches, Bayern Munich in 63% of their matches.
Real Madrid wins 44% of halftimes, Bayern Munich wins 63%.
The winner of their last meeting was Real Madrid.
On their last meeting Real Madrid won by 1 goals.
When Real Madrid leads 1-0 at home, they win in 90% of their matches.
When Bayern Munich leads 0-1 away, they win in 95% of their matches.
When Real Madrid is down 0-1 home, they win 62% of their matches.
When Bayern Munich is down 1-0 away, they win 36% of their matches.
In UEFA Champions League, Bayern Munich has better performance than Real Madrid.
Real Madrid's performance of the last 5 matches is better than Bayern Munich's.
Real Madrid have lost just 1 of their last 5 games against Bayern Munich (in all competitions).
In the last 5 meetings Real Madrid won 2, Bayern Munich won 1, 2 draws.
Real Madrid have lost just 0 of their last 5 UEFA Champions League games against Bayern Munich.
Bayern Munich have won just 0 of their last 5 UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid.
Real Madrid scores 1.8 goals in a match against Bayern Munich and Bayern Munich scores 1.8 goals against Real Madrid (on average).
Average number of goals in meetings between Real Madrid and Bayern Munich is 3.6.
Average number of goals in the first half in meetings between Real Madrid and Bayern Munich is 1.2.
Real Madrid scores 2.27 goals when playing at home and Bayern Munich scores 3 goals when playing away (on average).
If Luis Fernando Diaz Marulanda scores against Real Madrid it will be his 5th goal for Bayern Munich this season.
If Josip Stanisic receives a yellow card in today's match, he will be suspended after collecting 2 yellow cards so far this season.
This was Luis Fernando Diaz Marulanda's 5th goal for the season.

commentaries.text:
Michael Oliver blows his whistle and we are underway at 9:00 PM under the lights of the Santiago Bernabeu for this Champions League quarterfinal.
Bayern Munich arrive in lethal shape, riding a five-match European winning streak and sitting second in the competition rankings.
Real Madrid seek consistency after a turbulent run of recent form, but Arbeloa's side will carry immense confidence after eliminating Manchester City in the previous round.
The hosts line up in a highly attacking 4-3-3 formation designed to maximize the threat of Kylian Mbappe, who already boasts thirteen goals this season.
Vincent Kompany counters with a disciplined 4-2-3-1 setup for the visitors, tasking Harry Kane and his ten-goal pedigree with spearheading the German attack tonight.
Kimmich picks out Laimer 15 meters from goal, but the midfielder's right-footed attempt sailed well over the frame.
Bayern Munich earn a dead-ball opportunity in a high-leverage pocket of the final third. The ball is positioned 20 meters from goal in the half-space as the defensive line adjusts.
Michael Olise crafts an opening in the half-space and unleashes a left-footed strike from 25 meters, but the effort rises too steeply and clears the crossbar.
Olise prepares to swing in the corner, aiming to record his fifth assist of the campaign and reward the visitors' early dominance.
Kimmich stands over the quadrant, looking to capitalize on Bayern's persistent early pressure with this delivery.
Kimmich positions the delivery as Bayern Munich maintain their relentless assault on the Madrid penalty area.
Upamecano finds space in a central channel ten meters from the goal line and steers the effort wide.
Kylian Mbappe bursts through the middle of the final third and strikes from 10 meters, but the shot is saved.
Vinicius Junior cuts into the half-space and hammers a right-footed shot from 20 meters that rises over the right side of the frame.
Stanisic picks out Gnabry in a central channel 20 meters out; the attacker's left-footed hit deflected off a defender and spiraled wide.
Arda Guler stands over the set-piece, poised to carve out a definitive opening in this tight quarterfinal clash.
Mbappe feeds Vinicius Junior centrally within the attacking third. Vinicius Junior strikes a low right-footed drive at a distance of 20 meters toward the bottom right corner, forcing a save.
Trent Alexander-Arnold feeds Aurelien Tchouameni in a dangerous central position. Tchouameni strikes from 15 meters out, but the ball blazes high and wide of the top right corner.
Michael Olise readies the delivery at the quadrant as Bayern Munich attempt to convert their set-piece dominance into an advantage.
Trent Alexander-Arnold hammers a low effort from 15 meters in the half-space, but the ball deflected wide after clipping a defender.
Gnabry carves out space 15 meters from target. He struck a right-footed attempt, but this effort flew wide.
Joshua Kimmich stands over the corner flag to deliver a set-piece that could finally break the deadlock in this quarterfinal encounter.
Federico Valverde picks out Kylian Mbappe in a central pocket. Mbappe strikes with his right foot from 15 meters, but his effort is saved.
Trent Alexander-Arnold prepares to swing this corner into the box as Real Madrid search for the opening goal.
Rudiger latches on to the delivery inside the penalty area, but his right-footed strike clears the woodwork and veers wide of the frame from nearly 15 meters out.
Arda Guler finds Vinicius Junior drifting into the half-space. Vinicius Junior unleashes a right-footed strike from 25 meters, but the low effort is saved.
Aurelien Tchouameni enters the referee's notebook, picking up his third yellow card of the season with the match still level at zero-zero.
Bayern Munich earn a set-piece in a menacing pocket of the half-space. The ball is spotted 25 meters out as the visitors look to capitalize on this dead-ball opportunity.
GOAL! Luis Diaz lashes a right-footed shot home from 10 meters to give Bayern the lead! Gnabry provides the assist for Diaz's fifth goal of the season, making it 1-0 to the visitors.
Real Madrid earn a set-piece opportunity out on the flank. This delivery stands approximately 25 meters from the target.
Alexander-Arnold unleashes a right-footed rocket from the wing. The 25-meter blast catches a defender and deflects away from the goal frame.

Bayern Munich take a narrow 1-0 lead into the halftime interval after Luis Diaz fired home a crucial opening goal in the closing stages of the half.
Real Madrid consistently tested the opposition defense with a barrage of attempts from Vinicius Junior and Kylian Mbappe, but the hosts lacked the finishing touch required to find an equalizer.
The home side must sharpen their offensive execution to overturn this deficit in the second forty-five, while Bayern will likely look to exploit gaps on the counter utilizing Serge Gnabry's playmaking abilities.

The second half is underway at the Santiago Bernabeu. Real Madrid step back onto the pitch trailing 1-0 after Luis Diaz struck late in the first period for Bayern Munich. The home side must find an extra gear to turn this Champions League quarter-final around in front of their fans.

Bayern Munich now hold the psychological edge and can absorb pressure while hunting on the counter-attack. The hosts need an immediate response, demanding maximum output from Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Junior in the final third. Aurelien Tchouameni also has to navigate this chase carefully after picking up a booking earlier.

KANE! Bayern double their advantage as the forward drills a right-footed shot into the bottom corner from 20 meters! Michael Olise provides the assist for the striker to register his 11th goal this campaign.
Michael Olise squanders a massive opportunity to further punish Madrid, dragging his shot wide of the target from just 10 meters out in a central position.
Michael Olise readies the cross from the quadrant, threatening to swing the ball in and further distance Bayern Munich from their shell-shocked opponents.
Josip Stanisic drives a right-footed effort from 15 meters, but his strike from the half-space took a deflection and skipped wide of the lower left corner.
Tchouameni connects with Arda Guler’s pass in the half-space and unleashes a right-footed strike from 30 meters that deflects away from the goal.
Arda Guler positions himself at the arc, aiming for his fifth assist of the campaign to spark a necessary recovery for Madrid.
Vinicius Junior receives a ball from Federico Valverde and drills a left-footed attempt from 25 meters out, but the effort rises too high and clears the crossbar.
Michael Olise connects with a pass from Luis Diaz and directs a low, right-footed effort toward the middle of the net from 20 meters, but the attempt is saved.
Harry Kane squanders a massive opening from 10 meters as his right-footed effort from the heart of the box rises high and clear of the target!
Olise prepares to swing a delivery in from the flag, looking for his second assist of the night to potentially kill off the contest.
Upamecano pounces on the ball in the heart of the area, but the defender sends his effort from 10 meters off target!
Vinicius Junior finds an opening in the half-space but sends his right-footed attempt from 15 meters soaring over the crossbar and beyond the right upright.
Real Madrid introduce Jude Bellingham for Thiago Pitarch Pinar, looking to shift the momentum as they chase a two-score deficit.
Eder Militao replaces Dean Huijsen as Real Madrid shores up the backline. Jude Bellingham also joins the match in place of Thiago Pitarch Pinar as the home side searches for a tactical lifeline.
Michael Olise finds space following a pass from Josip Stanisic and lets fly from 20 meters. This left-footed strike lacks precision, sailing over the frame and wide of the left upright.
Joshua Kimmich positions himself at the flag to deliver a corner, looking to carve out a third goal for the dominant visitors and effectively kill off this quarterfinal tie.

Luis Diaz pivots in the middle of the final third to unleash a right-footed strike ten meters from goal, seeing a heavy deflection divert it wide of the bottom right corner. Bayern sustain the pressure on a reeling Madrid side.
Michael Olise prepares the corner as Bayern Munich look to utilize this opportunity to push their two-goal lead toward an unassailable margin.
Luis Diaz pounces 10 meters from goal but hammers a right-footed strike over the bar and left of the post.
Arda Guler stands over the set-piece from the quadrant, seeking to craft his fifth assist of the year and haul Real Madrid back into contention.
Mbappe meets Bellingham’s delivery and tests the goalkeeper with a low, right-footed strike from 15 meters, but the attempt is saved to maintain the two-goal cushion for Munich.
Arda Guler prepares to whip in a corner that represents a vital opportunity for Real Madrid to ignite a recovery.
Eder Militao meets Arda Guler's delivery 15 meters out, but the defender's effort clears the crossbar. Real Madrid's search for a lifeline continues as the attempt sails over the woodwork.
Vinicius Junior feeds Kylian Mbappe in the half-space, but the forward's right-footed drive nearly 15 meters out flashes past the right upright.
Alphonso Davies enters the pitch for Bayern Munich, replacing Konrad Laimer as the visitors look to sustain their two-goal lead.
Bayern Munich refresh their attack as Jamal Musiala comes on for Serge Gnabry. Alphonso Davies also enters the contest for Konrad Laimer to help preserve the two-goal advantage.
Michael Oliver cautions Jonathan Tah, marking the defender's second booking of the season as Bayern Munich protect a 2-0 lead over Real Madrid.

Brahim Diaz enters for Arda Guler as Real Madrid looks to inject fresh energy into their attack while trailing by two. The hosts are searching for a creative spark to dismantle the disciplined Bayern defense.
Mbappe meets a sharp Trent Alexander-Arnold delivery ten meters out, directing a left-footed shot toward the middle of the goal, but the keeper reacts to save and protect the two-goal cushion!
MBAPPE! Kylian Mbappe clinicaly converts an Alexander-Arnold delivery from 5 meters to reduce the deficit! He records his 14th goal of the season to make it 1-2.
Kane latches on to Kimmich’s delivery ten meters away, but his low right-footed effort pulled past the left upright.
Joshua Kimmich prepares the cross at the flag, searching for a clinical response to restore Bayern's comfortable lead and stifle the Madrid resurgence!
Jonathan Tah unloads a speculative effort from 35 meters out near the touchline, seeing his long-range blast fly harmlessly away from the frame.
Olise prepares to swing in a delivery that could decisively blunt this Real Madrid resurgence!
Luis Diaz receives a yellow card, becoming the second Bayern Munich player cautioned as they protect a narrow 2-1 advantage.
Real Madrid earn a set-piece out on the wing. The delivery point is situated roughly 25 meters from the target as the hosts look to level the score.
Alexander-Arnold prepares to whip in a pivotal corner as Madrid strive for a second to restore parity in this quarterfinal tie!
Vinicius Junior finds Brahim Diaz in the heart of the final third. Diaz unleashes a right-footed attempt from 25 meters, but the goalkeeper denies the shot aimed toward the left side of the netting.

Vinicius Junior drifts beyond the defensive line out on the wing, but the assistant's flag halts the attack 20 meters from the end line. Real Madrid see a promising forward move neutralized as they continue to trail by a single goal.
Manuel Neuer receives a caution, his second of this continental campaign, as Bayern Munich protect their 2-1 lead in this quarterfinal.
Vinicius Junior maneuvers into the half-space and connects with a pass from Mbappe to fire a right-footed blast from 20 meters, though the attempt toward the middle of the mouth was denied.
Alexander-Arnold stands over the quadrant, looking to deliver a set-piece that might pull Madrid level in this high-stakes knockout clash!

Eder Militao pounces on a pass from Alvaro Carreras in the heart of the offensive zone and hammers a right-footed drive 15 meters out, but the keeper thwarts his blast headed for the upper right corner!
Alphonso Davies picks out Jamal Musiala who hammers a low drive from roughly 20 meters out, but Madrid's keeper denies the right-footed attempt aimed inside the bottom-left upright.
Jamal Musiala receives his first caution of the campaign for a tactical foul as Bayern Munich struggle to maintain their slender 2-1 lead over Real Madrid.
Alphonso Davies picks out Jamal Musiala ten meters out, but the midfielder scuffs his left-footed attempt past the right upright!
Mbappe connects with Alvaro Carreras' service and hits a right-footed effort from 25 meters that flashes past the post.
Alexander-Arnold prepares to whip in a vital delivery that carries the weight of Madrid's hopes for a last-gasp equalizer!
Luis Diaz mistimes his run and the assistant raises the flag for offside. The Bayern winger strayed behind the defense amidst a congested area, roughly 15 meters from the target.
Leon Goretzka enters for Bayern Munich as Aleksandar Pavlovic makes way. The visitors prioritize midfield solidity to maintain their slender advantage through the concluding seconds.
Luis Diaz departs for Tom Bischof. Bayern Munich introduce fresh legs to help solidify their defensive structure in the closing seconds.

Referee Michael Oliver sounds the final whistle at the Santiago Bernabeu, confirming a vital 2-1 away victory for Bayern Munich over Real Madrid.
Clinical finishes from Luis Diaz and Harry Kane built a decisive lead for the visitors, withstanding a relentless late push and a goal from Kylian Mbappe.
This result hands Bayern a significant aggregate advantage ahead of the return fixture of this Champions League quarterfinal, leaving Madrid requiring a strong turnaround to advance.
